title: Iliad, Book 12: The Assault on the Wall
description: Book 12 of Homer's Iliad: The Assault on the Wall.
introduction: Book 12 of the Iliad: The Assault on the Wall. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Ὣς ὁ μὲν ἐν κλισίῃσι Μενοιτίου ἄλκιμος υἱός.
translation.text: While Patroclus tended the wounded, the Trojans stormed the Greek wall. Hector seized a great stone and smashed the gates. The Trojans poured through, and the battle raged among the ships.
